title.rendered: orta Cabin in Hebbal — Factory-Fitted MS Site Cabins for Manyata Tech Park, Bellary Road / ORR North & BIAL-Bound Sites

content.rendered:
A porta cabin in Hebbal can land on a Manyata Tech Park fitout perimeter, a Bellary Road frontage plot, a Thanisandra apartment-build site, or a BIAL-bound logistics yard within roughly three weeks of order — factory-fabricated at our Gopasandra (Bengaluru 560099) unit and dispatched up the NICE Road and ORR North loop to the Hebbal Flyover. SAMAN delivers across Hebbal’s pin codes (560024 / 560045 / 560064 / 560077 / 560092) and the adjacent Sahakar Nagar, Thanisandra, Veerannapalya, and Nagavara belts. Indicative price bands run Rs 1.3L to Rs 5.5L depending on cabin spec — table below.

Hebbal as Five Flyover-Anchored Spokes: Why Manyata’s Thanisandra Approach, the Bellary Road Frontage, ORR North’s Mahadevapura Edge, the Hennur Road Apartment Corridor, and Inner Hebbal/Sahakar Nagar Each Set a Different Porta Cabin Brief Before You Compare Price

Hebbal isn’t one buyer — it’s five distinct sub-markets radiating from the Hebbal Flyover where Bellary Road (NH-44) meets the Outer Ring Road. The Bellary Road North spoke carries clinic, F&B, and retail-frontage demand toward Esteem Mall, Kogilu Cross, and Yelahanka. The ORR North spoke turns east along the Mahadevapura edge for mid-belt commercial and Nagavara mixed-use buyers. The Thanisandra Main Road spoke is the Manyata Embassy Business Park approach plus the 18-36 month apartment-build corridor (Prestige, Embassy, Sobha, Brigade, Mantri sites). The Hennur Road spoke handles smaller residential and side-lane commercial fitouts. The inner Hebbal / Sahakar Nagar spoke anchors residential-extension and Vidyaranyapura demand. A porta cabin specified for one spoke is rarely the right cabin for another.

Five Hebbal Porta Cabin Buyer Profiles: Why a Manyata Embassy Business Park IT-Campus Fitout Contractor, a Bellary Road Frontage Clinic / F&B / Retail Fitout, a Thanisandra Main Road Apartment-Build Site Office, a BIAL-Bound Logistics or Last-Mile Hub, and a Hebbal Lake Catchment Civic or Private Redevelopment Each Order a Different Spec

Profile A — Manyata Embassy Business Park IT-campus fitout contractor. A multi-room configured cabin (executive + meeting + supervisor + pantry, AC provision, ELV pathway, false ceiling) — typically the multi-room configured portacabin office spec our Manyata Tech Park and ORR North IT-campus contractor buyers typically order, 20×8 to 20×20 ft. Profile B — Bellary Road frontage clinic / F&B / retail. A 10×10 to 12×16 single-room shop-front cabin with toughened-glass frontage and signage face. Profile C — Thanisandra apartment-build site office. A site office porta cabin in Hebbal for the 18-36 month Prestige / Embassy / Sobha / Brigade-class build, often with a small supervisor cabin. Profile D — BIAL-bound logistics / last-mile hub. Compact 8×8 guard cabin plus 10×10 supervisor cabin on Bellary Road or Yelahanka-KIAL Road. Profile E — Hebbal Lake catchment civic or private redevelopment. Single-room KSPCB-conformant cabin within ~1 km of the lake.

 

Porta Cabin Price in Hebbal in 2026: Four INR Bands by Buyer Profile, With GST and Gopasandra Transport Already Inside the Number

Porta cabin price in Hebbal moves with cabin size, partition complexity, and finish level — but every band below already includes GST and the Bangalore-region fixed transport from Gopasandra:

 

Buyer Profile Typical Spec Indicative INR Band Lead Time
Manyata IT-campus / ORR multi-room fitout 20×8 to 20×20 ft, multi-room configured, AC provision, false ceiling Rs 3.8L – 5.5L 18–23 days
Bellary Road frontage shop-front 10×10 to 12×16 ft, single-room, toughened-glass frontage Rs 2.2L – 3.5L 12–18 days
Thanisandra apartment-build site office 20×8 ft site office (+ optional 8×8 supervisor cabin) Rs 2.8L – 4.5L 15–21 days
BIAL guard / Hebbal Lake KSPCB-conformant 8×8 to 10×10 ft, single-room MS frame Rs 1.3L – 2.4L 10–15 days

What moves a band: partition count, AC + ELV pre-fit, panel grade, frontage glazing, and any KSPCB-conformance documentation. For an exact-spec quote, see our Bangalore factory-direct porta cabin price sheet covering Hebbal/Manyata-area orders.

How Long Does It Take to Deliver a Porta Cabin from Gopasandra to Hebbal — and What the Same Service-Vehicle Reach Means When Your Cabin Needs Help

A SAMAN porta cabin dispatched from our Gopasandra factory (Bengaluru 560099) reaches Hebbal in roughly 2.5 to 3.5 hours off-peak across the 45-55 km NICE Road and ORR loop, stretching to 4-5 hours in peak Bangalore traffic. The cabin leaves the factory already fitted; same-day placement on a prepared site and crane-assisted installation finishes in 5-7 days.

The same corridor is also the reverse path for warranty service — SAMAN’s structural frame and base carry a 5-year warranty, finishing components carry 1-2 years, and engineered service life is 20-25 years with maintenance. Because Hebbal sits inside our same-Karnataka dispatch radius, service-vehicle reach for a finishing-warranty visit is the same 2.5-3.5 hour window — not a multi-day escalation. SAMAN ships our ready-to-deploy site cabins across the wider Bangalore metro from this single Gopasandra dispatch point.

BBMP Yelahanka × Mahadevapura Zone Split and KSPCB Hebbal Lake Catchment: Three Permission Layers That Decide Whether Your Hebbal Install Moves in 5-7 Days or Stalls 5-7 Weeks

Hebbal straddles two BBMP zones: most of the inner Hebbal–Sahakar Nagar–RT Nagar belt sits inside BBMP Yelahanka Zone, while the Manyata-Nagavara-Devasandra eastern side falls into BBMP Mahadevapura Zone. Different zone offices, different building-application counters — buyers should confirm the zone before scheduling install. A second layer is the KSPCB Hebbal Lake catchment: plots within ~1 km of the lake (Veerannapalya, Kempapura, Nagavara fringe) may require KSPCB conformance for any structure tied to drainage or sewage. A third practical layer — for Manyata-adjacent installs — is the IT-park FM gate-pass and vehicle entry permission from the building’s FM office. Confirming all three before dispatch separates a 5-7 day Hebbal install from a 5-7 week stall.

Frequently Asked Questions: Porta Cabin in Hebbal

Can SAMAN deliver a porta cabin inside Manyata Embassy Business Park?

Yes. Manyata fitout contractors are a routine buyer profile. We coordinate dispatch around the building’s FM gate-pass schedule and supply the vehicle and crane-access details FM offices request.

How does the Hebbal Lake KSPCB catchment affect placement?

Plots within ~1 km of the lake — Veerannapalya, Kempapura, Nagavara fringe, Mestripalya — may need KSPCB conformance for structures tied to drainage or sewage. SAMAN supplies cabin-side documentation; the site application is buyer-side.

Do I need BBMP permission for a Bellary Road frontage install?

Generally yes — Yelahanka Zone for inner Hebbal, Mahadevapura Zone for Manyata-Nagavara. Start the BBMP application in parallel with cabin fabrication so the timelines align.

What’s the realistic Gopasandra-to-Hebbal transit time?

Roughly 2.5-3.5 hours off-peak across the 45-55 km NICE Road + ORR loop; 4-5 hours in peak traffic. We dispatch early morning to stay inside off-peak windows.

Get a Quote for Your Hebbal Porta Cabin — Direct from Our Gopasandra Factory

For a Hebbal porta cabin quote covering exact size, finish, and dispatch window:

Bangalore (serving Hebbal from Gopasandra):
Call +91 80886 85440 | WhatsApp +91 88616 22859

Delhi NCR (for North India enquiries):
Call +91 87960 39938 | WhatsApp +91 97089 89937

excerpt.rendered: Discover affordable and durable Porta Cabins in Hebbal for instant shelter solutions. Get customized designs, quick installation, and reliable service for your portable cabin needs.

author.name: Aman Dubey
author.description: Aman Dubey is the lead marketing and copywriting expert at Saman Portable, specializing in prefabricated, shipping-container, and modular structures. With over 15 years of industry experience, Aman has helped global clients optimize design, streamline production, and amplify brand visibility through data-driven content and strategic SEO. Under his guidance, Saman Portable has become a trusted name in container office solutions and turnkey prefabricated buildings across India and beyond.

caption.rendered: A SAMAN porta cabin on a Bellary Road frontage plot — typical of the Hebbal Flyover approach where NH-44 meets the Outer Ring Road.
